user.title: OK
user.description: Connect your OK account and register a Home Assistant app device.

data_description.email: The email address used for the OK app.
data_description.password: Your OK app password. It is only used to register and authenticate this Home Assistant device.

data_description.email: The email address used for the existing OK account.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure OK
reconfigure.description: Update the OK credentials used by this integration.

data_description.email: The email address used for the existing OK account.

error.wrong_account: The credentials belong to a different OK account.

abort.already_configured: This OK account is already configured.
abort.unknown: Could not find the OK config entry.

data_description.include_receipts: Fetch charging receipts and create the last session entities.
data_description.enable_control_buttons: Create start, stop, cancel schedule, and restart button entities.
data_description.enable_energy_prices: Fetch energy prices and create energy price entities.

data_description.enable_realtime_updates: Use Firestore realtime watchers for charger and charging session status updates.

entry_not_loaded.message: The OK config entry {config_entry_id} is not loaded.

entity_not_found.message: The selected entity {entity_id} is not available.

entity_not_ok.message: The selected entity {entity_id} is not an OK entity.

entity_missing_config_entry.message: The selected OK entity {entity_id} is not linked to a loaded config entry.

entity_missing_connector.message: The selected entity {entity_id} does not identify an OK charger connector.

connector_not_found.message: The selected entity {entity_id} does not match a loaded OK charger connector.

active_charging_not_found.message: No active OK charging session or schedule is available for the selected charger connector.

invalid_schedule_window.message: Scheduled end must be after scheduled start.

api_authentication_error.message: OK authentication failed and reauthentication has been started: {reason}

realtime_updates_unavailable.title: OK realtime updates are unavailable
realtime_updates_unavailable.description: OK charging status will continue to update by polling, but Firestore realtime updates could not be started: {reason}
